calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-14-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as assigned by Dept. 206 this day for Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Gail Dekreon, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.
Vivian Lerche, Esq. special appeared for plaintiff American Express Bank, FSB.
No appearance by defendant Cynthia S. Stott.
Declaration of plaintiff's witness Vivian Hinds in lieu of personal testimony at trial (CCP 98) was filed on 7-14-2017
After hearing the evidence and considering of the exhibits presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Damages $11,515.67.
Costs - $524.85, for a total judgment in the amount of $12,040.52.
Judgment was submitted to and signed in open Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-14-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

Motion To Deem Matters Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-01-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: ATTY VIVIAN L. LERCHE OF MICHAEL AND ASSOCIATES LAW FIRM TEL NO. 415-680-5731 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES.

RULING- PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB'S Motion To Deem Matters Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions IS UNOPPOSED AND GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro tem: Douglas Robbins; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany; Not Reported.=302/JPT.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2017 Set For Trial On Aug-14-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
